key_point: A viral social media post claims that eating garlic daily can prevent all types of cancer.
A viral social media post claims that 5G technology causes cancer and weakens the immune system.
A viral social media post claims that drinking lemon water daily can cure breast cancer, specifically by boosting the immune system and detoxifying the body.
A recent study claims that using essential oils can cure asthma.
A recent study claims that using essential oils can cure diabetes.

A recent study claims that a specific probiotic strain, Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG, can completely eliminate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) in 90% of adult patients within 3 months of daily intake.
A recent study claims that taking vitamin C supplements can prevent the common cold.
A recent social media post claims that using lavender oil as a natural remedy can prevent and cure Alzheimer's disease by improving brain function and memory.
A viral social media post claims that consuming a teaspoon of baking soda daily can cure any type of cancer.
A viral social media post claims that applying aloe vera directly to the skin can completely cure skin cancer within 3 months.
An online article claims that consuming three raw garlic cloves daily can prevent and cure all types of cancer within a month.
A recent blog post claims that taking a high dose of vitamin C (5 grams per day) can prevent the common cold and cure it within 24 hours once contracted.
A recent study claims that taking a high dose of Vitamin C supplements daily can prevent the common cold in adults.
An online article claims that consuming a spoonful of honey every morning prevents all types of cancer and significantly improves heart health.
A recent article claims that a daily intake of garlic can prevent heart attacks by reducing cholesterol levels by 30% within a month.
A viral social media post claims that eating a clove of garlic every day can prevent and cure all types of cancer within 6 months.
A popular health influencer on social media claims that ingesting gold nanoparticles can significantly enhance cognitive functions and cure Alzheimer's disease within 6 months.
A recent study from the University of California claims that eating a raw garlic clove every morning can cure chronic bronchitis within two weeks.
A recent blog post claims that consuming 2 tablespoons of raw honey daily can cure seasonal allergies within one month by strengthening the immune system.
A recent article claims that taking 2 grams of spirulina daily can prevent and treat HIV within 6 months in adults.
A recent article in a health blog claims that eating a specific brand of dark chocolate, 'ChocoHealth', every day can cure chronic fatigue syndrome within 30 days.
A recent news article claims that a single dose of an experimental stem cell treatment can completely regenerate the heart muscle in patients with severe heart failure within 2 months.
